example_sentence_en: We all have a responsibility to contribute to society.
example_sentence_cn: 我们都有责任为社会做出贡献。

example_sentence_en: Social media has a huge impact on young people.
example_sentence_cn: 社交媒体对年轻人有巨大的影响。

example_sentence_en: Economic inequality remains a major challenge worldwide.
example_sentence_cn: 经济不平等仍然是全球面临的重大挑战。

example_sentence_en: Many organizations work to reduce poverty around the world.
example_sentence_cn: 许多组织致力于减少世界各地的贫困。

example_sentence_en: The government is responsible for the welfare of its citizens.
example_sentence_cn: 政府对公民的福利负有责任。

example_sentence_en: They fought for justice and equality.
example_sentence_cn: 他们为正义和平等而战。

example_sentence_en: Gender equality is an important issue in modern society.
example_sentence_cn: 性别平等是现代社会的重要议题。

example_sentence_en: Racial discrimination should never be tolerated.
example_sentence_cn: 种族歧视绝对不能被容忍。

example_sentence_en: We must overcome prejudice to build a fairer society.
example_sentence_cn: 我们必须克服偏见，建立一个更公平的社会。

example_sentence_en: Volunteering is a great way to give back to the community.
example_sentence_cn: 做志愿者是回报社区的好方法。

example_sentence_en: Urban areas tend to have more job opportunities.
example_sentence_cn: 城市地区往往有更多的就业机会。

example_sentence_en: Children in rural areas sometimes lack access to good education.
example_sentence_cn: 农村地区的孩子有时缺乏接受良好教育的机会。

example_sentence_en: China has the largest population in the world.
example_sentence_cn: 中国拥有世界上最多的人口。

example_sentence_en: The government introduced new policies to reduce pollution.
example_sentence_cn: 政府出台了新政策以减少污染。

example_sentence_en: Democracy gives citizens the right to vote.
example_sentence_cn: 民主赋予公民投票权。

example_sentence_en: The school has a strict policy against bullying.
example_sentence_cn: 学校有严格的反欺凌政策。

example_sentence_en: The country underwent major economic reforms.
example_sentence_cn: 该国经历了重大的经济改革。
inflection: 动词变化: reforms / reformed / reforming; 复数: reforms

example_sentence_en: The Industrial Revolution changed the world forever.
example_sentence_cn: 工业革命永远改变了世界。

example_sentence_en: The conflict between the two countries lasted for years.
example_sentence_cn: 两国之间的冲突持续了多年。
inflection: 动词变化: conflicts / conflicted / conflicting; 复数: conflicts

example_sentence_en: Peaceful resolution of conflicts is always preferable.
example_sentence_cn: 和平解决冲突总是更可取的。

example_sentence_en: Education is the key to escaping poverty.
example_sentence_cn: 教育是摆脱贫困的关键。

example_sentence_en: Everyone deserves an equal opportunity to succeed.
example_sentence_cn: 每个人都应该有平等的成功机会。

example_sentence_en: Climate change is one of the most pressing issues of our time.
example_sentence_cn: 气候变化是我们这个时代最紧迫的问题之一。

example_sentence_en: The world is facing a climate crisis.
example_sentence_cn: 世界正面临气候危机。

example_sentence_en: We need to raise public awareness about environmental issues.
example_sentence_cn: 我们需要提高公众对环境问题的意识。

example_sentence_en: Your attitude determines your altitude.
example_sentence_cn: 你的态度决定你的高度。

example_sentence_en: Try to look at the problem from a different perspective.
example_sentence_cn: 试着从不同角度看这个问题。

example_sentence_en: Globalization has connected people across the world.
example_sentence_cn: 全球化将世界各地的人们联系在一起。

example_sentence_en: Migration has always been part of human history.
example_sentence_cn: 迁徙一直是人类历史的一部分。

example_sentence_en: Social integration requires effort from all members.
example_sentence_cn: 社会融合需要所有成员的努力。

example_sentence_en: Technology has had a huge impact on daily life.
example_sentence_cn: 技术对日常生活产生了巨大影响。
inflection: 动词变化: impacts / impacted / impacting; 复数: impacts

example_sentence_en: We must think about the consequences of our actions.
example_sentence_cn: 我们必须思考我们行动的后果。

example_sentence_en: Her contribution to the research was invaluable.
example_sentence_cn: 她对这项研究的贡献是无价的。

example_sentence_en: Thousands of volunteers helped during the flood.
example_sentence_cn: 洪灾期间有数千名志愿者提供了帮助。
inflection: 动词变化: volunteers / volunteered / volunteering; 复数: volunteers

example_sentence_en: She donates regularly to several charities.
example_sentence_cn: 她定期向几个慈善机构捐款。

example_sentence_en: She advocates for the rights of women and children.
example_sentence_cn: 她倡导妇女和儿童的权利。
inflection: 动词变化: advocates / advocated / advocating; 复数: advocates

example_sentence_en: The media plays a powerful role in shaping public opinion.
example_sentence_cn: 媒体在塑造公众舆论方面发挥着强大的作用。

example_sentence_en: The game was broadcast live to millions of viewers.
example_sentence_cn: 这场比赛被直播给数百万观众。
inflection: 动词变化: broadcasts / broadcast / broadcasting; 复数: broadcasts

example_sentence_en: We should be able to identify propaganda and think critically.
example_sentence_cn: 我们应该能够识别宣传并进行批判性思考。

example_sentence_en: We should avoid making judgments based on stereotypes.
example_sentence_cn: 我们应该避免基于刻板印象作判断。

example_sentence_en: Social norms vary greatly between different cultures.
example_sentence_cn: 社会规范在不同文化之间差异很大。

example_sentence_en: This topic is considered taboo in some cultures.
example_sentence_cn: 这个话题在某些文化中被认为是禁忌。

example_sentence_en: Medical ethics require doctors to put patients first.
example_sentence_cn: 医学伦理要求医生把病人放在首位。

example_sentence_en: Telling the truth is a moral obligation.
example_sentence_cn: 说实话是一种道德义务。
inflection: 比较级: more moral | 最高级: most moral

example_sentence_en: Empathy is the ability to understand others' feelings.
example_sentence_cn: 同理心是理解他人感受的能力。

example_sentence_en: She showed great compassion for the homeless.
example_sentence_cn: 她对无家可归者表现出极大的同情。

example_sentence_en: International solidarity is needed to fight climate change.
example_sentence_cn: 需要国际团结来应对气候变化。

example_sentence_en: Every human being deserves to be treated with dignity.
example_sentence_cn: 每个人都应该被有尊严地对待。

example_sentence_en: Education is a privilege that not everyone has access to.
example_sentence_cn: 教育是并非每个人都能获得的特权。

example_sentence_en: Children and the elderly are particularly vulnerable.
example_sentence_cn: 儿童和老年人特别容易受到伤害。

example_sentence_en: Minority groups are often marginalized in society.
example_sentence_cn: 少数群体在社会中往往被边缘化。
inflection: 动词变化: marginalizes / marginalized / marginalizing

example_sentence_en: She eventually became part of the mainstream art scene.
example_sentence_cn: 她最终成为了主流艺术界的一部分。

example_sentence_en: Online shopping is a global phenomenon.
example_sentence_cn: 网上购物是一个全球现象。

example_sentence_en: The scientist formed a hypothesis and tested it.
example_sentence_cn: 科学家提出了一个假说并进行了验证。

example_sentence_en: The experiment proved that the hypothesis was correct.
example_sentence_cn: 这个实验证明了假说是正确的。
inflection: 动词变化: experiments / experimented / experimenting; 复数: experiments

example_sentence_en: Careful observation is the first step of scientific research.
example_sentence_cn: 仔细观察是科学研究的第一步。

example_sentence_en: The data collected supports our theory.
example_sentence_cn: 收集到的数据支持了我们的理论。

example_sentence_en: The analysis of the results took several weeks.
example_sentence_cn: 对结果的分析花了几周时间。

example_sentence_en: We need to analyze the data carefully.
example_sentence_cn: 我们需要仔细分析数据。
inflection: 动词变化: analyzes / analyzed / analyzing

example_sentence_en: After the experiment, they drew a clear conclusion.
example_sentence_cn: 实验结束后，他们得出了一个清晰的结论。

example_sentence_en: Scientists are conducting research on cancer treatments.
example_sentence_cn: 科学家正在对癌症治疗方法进行研究。
inflection: 动词变化: researches / researched / researching

example_sentence_en: The scientists worked in the laboratory every day.
example_sentence_cn: 科学家们每天在实验室工作。

example_sentence_en: Marie Curie discovered two new elements.
example_sentence_cn: 玛丽·居里发现了两种新元素。
inflection: 动词变化: discovers / discovered / discovering

example_sentence_en: The discovery changed our understanding of biology.
example_sentence_cn: 这一发现改变了我们对生物学的理解。

example_sentence_en: Advances in genetics have revolutionized medicine.
example_sentence_cn: 遗传学的进步彻底改变了医学。

example_sentence_en: Some diseases are caused by a defective gene.
example_sentence_cn: 某些疾病是由基因缺陷引起的。

example_sentence_en: Darwin's theory of evolution changed biology forever.
example_sentence_cn: 达尔文的进化论永远改变了生物学。

example_sentence_en: Millions of species are at risk of extinction.
example_sentence_cn: 数百万种物种面临灭绝的危险。

example_sentence_en: Everything is made of atoms.
example_sentence_cn: 万物都由原子组成。

example_sentence_en: Water consists of two hydrogen atoms and one oxygen molecule.
example_sentence_cn: 水由两个氢原子和一个氧分子组成。

example_sentence_en: The chemical reaction produced a lot of heat.
example_sentence_cn: 化学反应产生了大量热量。

example_sentence_en: The scientist discovered a new mathematical formula.
example_sentence_cn: 科学家发现了一个新的数学公式。

example_sentence_en: Newton discovered the law of gravity.
example_sentence_cn: 牛顿发现了万有引力定律。

example_sentence_en: Exposure to too much radiation is harmful.
example_sentence_cn: 暴露于过多辐射是有害的。

example_sentence_en: Quantum physics is one of the most complex fields of science.
example_sentence_cn: 量子物理学是最复杂的科学领域之一。

example_sentence_en: Einstein's theory of relativity changed physics.
example_sentence_cn: 爱因斯坦的相对论改变了物理学。

example_sentence_en: Scientific thinking requires evidence and logic.
example_sentence_cn: 科学思维需要证据和逻辑。

example_sentence_en: The discovery was significant for medical research.
example_sentence_cn: 这一发现对医学研究意义重大。
inflection: 比较级: more significant | 最高级: most significant

example_sentence_en: We need innovative solutions to tackle climate change.
example_sentence_cn: 我们需要创新的解决方案来应对气候变化。

example_sentence_en: The new vaccine is a major breakthrough in medicine.
example_sentence_cn: 这种新疫苗是医学上的重大突破。

example_sentence_en: He filed a patent for his new invention.
example_sentence_cn: 他为他的新发明申请了专利。

example_sentence_en: An early diagnosis is important for successful treatment.
example_sentence_cn: 早期诊断对于成功治疗很重要。

example_sentence_en: The new treatment was more effective than the old one.
example_sentence_cn: 新疗法比旧疗法更有效。

example_sentence_en: The vaccine was developed in record time.
example_sentence_cn: 这种疫苗是在创纪录的时间内开发出来的。

example_sentence_en: Neuroscience helps us understand how the brain works.
example_sentence_cn: 神经科学帮助我们了解大脑是如何运作的。

example_sentence_en: She decided to study biology at university.
example_sentence_cn: 她决定在大学学习生物学。

example_sentence_en: Chemistry is often called the central science.
example_sentence_cn: 化学通常被称为中心科学。

example_sentence_en: He has always been fascinated by physics.
example_sentence_cn: 他一直对物理学着迷。

example_sentence_en: Mathematics is the language of science.
example_sentence_cn: 数学是科学的语言。

example_sentence_en: Social media platforms use algorithms to recommend content.
example_sentence_cn: 社交媒体平台使用算法来推荐内容。

example_sentence_en: Artificial intelligence is transforming every industry.
example_sentence_cn: 人工智能正在改变每个行业。

example_sentence_en: She wrote a biography of Marie Curie.
example_sentence_cn: 她写了一部关于玛丽·居里的传记。

example_sentence_en: He published his autobiography at the age of 70.
example_sentence_cn: 他在70岁时出版了他的自传。

example_sentence_en: The magazine published a profile of the famous scientist.
example_sentence_cn: 杂志刊登了这位著名科学家的个人简介。

example_sentence_en: The book portrays her as a determined and brave woman.
example_sentence_cn: 这本书将她描绘成一个坚定而勇敢的女人。
inflection: 动词变化: portrays / portrayed / portraying

example_sentence_en: Einstein left a lasting legacy in science.
example_sentence_cn: 爱因斯坦在科学上留下了持久的遗产。

example_sentence_en: She dedicated her life to helping the poor.
example_sentence_cn: 她将自己的生命奉献给了帮助穷人。
inflection: 动词变化: dedicates / dedicated / dedicating

example_sentence_en: He was devoted to his research all his life.
example_sentence_cn: 他一生都致力于他的研究。

example_sentence_en: I admire her courage and determination.
example_sentence_cn: 我钦佩她的勇气和决心。
inflection: 动词变化: admires / admired / admiring

example_sentence_en: She received great admiration for her achievements.
example_sentence_cn: 她的成就赢得了极大的钦佩。

example_sentence_en: Success requires hard work and perseverance.
example_sentence_cn: 成功需要努力和坚持不懈。

example_sentence_en: His persistence finally paid off.
example_sentence_cn: 他的坚持终于得到了回报。

example_sentence_en: She was one of the most influential scientists of her time.
example_sentence_cn: 她是她那个时代最有影响力的科学家之一。

example_sentence_en: The hospital is renowned for its excellent care.
example_sentence_cn: 这家医院以其出色的护理而闻名。

example_sentence_en: Marie Curie was a pioneer in the field of radioactivity.
example_sentence_cn: 玛丽·居里是放射性领域的先驱。
inflection: 动词变化: pioneers / pioneered / pioneering; 复数: pioneers

example_sentence_en: Winning the Nobel Prize was a milestone in his career.
example_sentence_cn: 获得诺贝尔奖是他职业生涯的里程碑。

example_sentence_en: She overcame many obstacles to reach her goal.
example_sentence_cn: 她克服了许多障碍才达成目标。

example_sentence_en: Every setback was a lesson that made her stronger.
example_sentence_cn: 每一次挫折都是让她变得更强大的课程。

example_sentence_en: The scientist's triumph was celebrated worldwide.
example_sentence_cn: 这位科学家的胜利在全世界都受到庆祝。
inflection: 动词变化: triumphs / triumphed / triumphing; 复数: triumphs

example_sentence_en: She made great sacrifices for her family.
example_sentence_cn: 她为家人做出了巨大的牺牲。
inflection: 动词变化: sacrifices / sacrificed / sacrificing; 复数: sacrifices

example_sentence_en: Her passion for science drove her to success.
example_sentence_cn: 她对科学的热情推动她走向成功。

example_sentence_en: She aspired to become the first female president.
example_sentence_cn: 她渴望成为第一位女总统。
inflection: 动词变化: aspires / aspired / aspiring

example_sentence_en: Despite his fame, he was known for his humility.
example_sentence_cn: 尽管出名，他以谦逊而闻名。

example_sentence_en: He was known for his honesty and integrity.
example_sentence_cn: 他以诚实和正直而著称。

example_sentence_en: The protagonist is a complex character with many flaws.
example_sentence_cn: 主人公是一个有许多缺点的复杂人物。

example_sentence_en: The novel tells the story of a young woman's journey.
example_sentence_cn: 这部小说讲述了一位年轻女性的旅程。

example_sentence_en: The plot of the novel is full of surprising twists.
example_sentence_cn: 小说的情节充满了出人意料的转折。

example_sentence_en: The main theme of the novel is love and sacrifice.
example_sentence_cn: 这部小说的主题是爱与牺牲。

example_sentence_en: The writer uses a beautiful metaphor to describe the sea.
example_sentence_cn: 作者用了一个美丽的比喻来描述大海。

example_sentence_en: The poem is full of vivid imagery.
example_sentence_cn: 这首诗充满了生动的意象。

example_sentence_en: The author uses symbolism to convey deeper meanings.
example_sentence_cn: 作者用象征手法传达更深层的含义。

example_sentence_en: She prefers reading science fiction to fantasy.
example_sentence_cn: 比起奇幻小说，她更喜欢读科幻小说。

example_sentence_en: He enjoys reading nonfiction books about history.
example_sentence_cn: 他喜欢读关于历史的非虚构类书籍。

example_sentence_en: His prose is clear and easy to understand.
example_sentence_cn: 他的散文清晰易懂。

example_sentence_en: She found comfort in reading poetry during difficult times.
example_sentence_cn: 她在困难时期通过读诗找到了慰藉。

example_sentence_en: She wrote a beautiful poem about her hometown.
example_sentence_cn: 她写了一首关于她家乡的美丽诗歌。

example_sentence_en: The poem has four stanzas.
example_sentence_cn: 这首诗有四个诗节。

example_sentence_en: Cat and hat rhyme with each other.
example_sentence_cn: cat和hat互相押韵。
inflection: 动词变化: rhymes / rhymed / rhyming; 复数: rhymes

example_sentence_en: The narrative structure of this novel is very complex.
example_sentence_cn: 这部小说的叙事结构非常复杂。

example_sentence_en: The narrator tells the story from a first-person perspective.
example_sentence_cn: 叙述者从第一人称视角讲述故事。

example_sentence_en: The protagonist faces many challenges throughout the story.
example_sentence_cn: 主人公在整个故事中面临许多挑战。

example_sentence_en: The antagonist tries to stop the hero at every turn.
example_sentence_cn: 反派试图在每一步阻止主人公。

example_sentence_en: The setting of the novel is a small English village.
example_sentence_cn: 小说的背景是一个英国小村庄。

example_sentence_en: The book is an allegory of political corruption.
example_sentence_cn: 这本书是对政治腐败的一种寓言。

example_sentence_en: The play is a satire of modern political life.
example_sentence_cn: 这部戏剧是对现代政治生活的一种讽刺。

example_sentence_en: Romeo and Juliet is one of Shakespeare's greatest tragedies.
example_sentence_cn: 《罗密欧与朱丽叶》是莎士比亚最伟大的悲剧之一。

example_sentence_en: His plays are known for their clever comedy.
example_sentence_cn: 他的戏剧以巧妙的喜剧性而著称。

example_sentence_en: She starred in a TV drama about a detective.
example_sentence_cn: 她主演了一部关于侦探的电视剧。

example_sentence_en: Mystery is her favorite genre of fiction.
example_sentence_cn: 推理是她最喜欢的小说体裁。

example_sentence_en: She is the author of more than twenty novels.
example_sentence_cn: 她是二十多部小说的作者。

example_sentence_en: Li Bai was one of China's greatest poets.
example_sentence_cn: 李白是中国最伟大的诗人之一。

example_sentence_en: Shakespeare is the world's most famous playwright.
example_sentence_cn: 莎士比亚是世界上最著名的剧作家。

example_sentence_en: The museum contains an ancient manuscript.
example_sentence_cn: 博物馆里藏有一份古代手稿。

example_sentence_en: Her first novel was published when she was twenty-five.
example_sentence_cn: 她的第一部小说在她二十五岁时出版了。
inflection: 动词变化: publishes / published / publishing

example_sentence_en: She read an excerpt from her new book at the event.
example_sentence_cn: 她在活动上朗读了新书的一段摘录。

example_sentence_en: Readers often interpret poems in different ways.
example_sentence_cn: 读者往往会对诗歌进行不同的解读。
inflection: 动词变化: interprets / interpreted / interpreting

example_sentence_en: She wrote a critique of the author's latest work.
example_sentence_cn: 她写了一篇对这位作者最新作品的评论。
inflection: 动词变化: critiques / critiqued / critiquing; 复数: critiques

example_sentence_en: Some books are banned due to government censorship.
example_sentence_cn: 一些书籍因政府审查而遭到禁止。

example_sentence_en: He quoted a famous line from Shakespeare's Hamlet.
example_sentence_cn: 他引用了莎士比亚《哈姆雷特》中的一句名言。
inflection: 动词变化: quotes / quoted / quoting; 复数: quotes

example_sentence_en: The poem contains an allusion to Greek mythology.
example_sentence_cn: 这首诗中包含了对希腊神话的典故。

example_sentence_en: The irony of the situation was not lost on him.
example_sentence_cn: 他没有忽略这种情况的讽刺意味。

example_sentence_en: He tends to exaggerate when telling stories.
example_sentence_cn: 他讲故事时倾向于夸张。
inflection: 动词变化: exaggerates / exaggerated / exaggerating

example_sentence_en: The dark clouds at the beginning foreshadow the disaster.
example_sentence_cn: 开篇的乌云预示了灾难的到来。
inflection: 动词变化: foreshadows / foreshadowed / foreshadowing

example_sentence_en: The climax of the story is very exciting.
example_sentence_cn: 故事的高潮部分非常精彩。

example_sentence_en: The resolution of the conflict brings the story to an end.
example_sentence_cn: 冲突的解决使故事走向终结。

example_sentence_en: The book is written as a parable about greed.
example_sentence_cn: 这本书写成了一个关于贪婪的寓言故事。

example_sentence_en: The author spent years writing the manuscript.
example_sentence_cn: 作者花了数年时间撰写原稿。

example_sentence_en: She revised her essay three times before submitting it.
example_sentence_cn: 她在提交之前修改了三遍论文。
inflection: 动词变化: revises / revised / revising

example_sentence_en: The new edition of the textbook has been updated.
example_sentence_cn: 教科书的新版本已经更新了。

example_sentence_en: The book received excellent reviews from critics.
example_sentence_cn: 这本书获得了评论家的好评。

example_sentence_en: Critical thinking is an important skill for students.
example_sentence_cn: 批判性思维是学生的重要技能。
inflection: 比较级: more critical | 最高级: most critical

example_sentence_en: Good books stimulate the imagination.
example_sentence_cn: 好书能激发想象力。
inflection: 动词变化: stimulates / stimulated / stimulating

example_sentence_en: Great literature enlightens readers and broadens their minds.
example_sentence_cn: 伟大的文学启迪读者并开阔他们的思维。
inflection: 动词变化: enlightens / enlightened / enlightening

example_sentence_en: A good teacher knows how to engage students.
example_sentence_cn: 好老师知道如何吸引学生的注意力。
inflection: 动词变化: engages / engaged / engaging

example_sentence_en: The music evokes memories of childhood.
example_sentence_cn: 这音乐唤起了童年的回忆。
inflection: 动词变化: evokes / evoked / evoking

example_sentence_en: The book provides a comprehensive overview of history.
example_sentence_cn: 这本书提供了对历史的全面概述。
inflection: 比较级: more comprehensive | 最高级: most comprehensive

example_sentence_en: The novel has a profound effect on its readers.
example_sentence_cn: 这部小说对读者有深刻的影响。
inflection: 比较级: more profound | 最高级: most profound

example_sentence_en: She delivered an eloquent speech at the graduation.
example_sentence_cn: 她在毕业典礼上发表了一篇动人的演讲。
inflection: 比较级: more eloquent | 最高级: most eloquent

example_sentence_en: Her vivid description made the scene come alive.
example_sentence_cn: 她生动的描述使场景栩栩如生。
inflection: 比较级: more vivid | 最高级: most vivid

example_sentence_en: The ending of the story is deliberately ambiguous.
example_sentence_cn: 故事的结尾是故意模棱两可的。
inflection: 比较级: more ambiguous | 最高级: most ambiguous

example_sentence_en: A good journalist should be objective when reporting.
example_sentence_cn: 好的记者在报道时应该保持客观。

example_sentence_en: Art appreciation is often subjective.
example_sentence_cn: 艺术欣赏往往是主观的。

example_sentence_en: There is an implicit meaning behind the words.
example_sentence_cn: 这些话语背后有着隐含的意思。

example_sentence_en: The instructions were very explicit and easy to follow.
example_sentence_cn: 这些说明非常明确，易于遵循。

example_sentence_en: Could you elaborate on your main argument?
example_sentence_cn: 你能详细说明你的主要论点吗？
inflection: 动词变化: elaborates / elaborated / elaborating

example_sentence_en: Please write an abstract for your research paper.
example_sentence_cn: 请为你的研究论文写一个摘要。

example_sentence_en: Always include a bibliography in your academic paper.
example_sentence_cn: 学术论文中一定要包含参考书目。

example_sentence_en: Please list all references at the end of your essay.
example_sentence_cn: 请在文章末尾列出所有参考文献。

example_sentence_en: Scientists need evidence to support their claims.
example_sentence_cn: 科学家需要证据来支持他们的说法。

example_sentence_en: The essay presents a strong argument for change.
example_sentence_cn: 这篇文章提出了一个强有力的变革论据。

example_sentence_en: A strong essay acknowledges the counterargument.
example_sentence_cn: 一篇强有力的文章承认反驳意见。

example_sentence_en: Please paraphrase this paragraph in your own words.
example_sentence_cn: 请用你自己的话改写这段文字。
inflection: 动词变化: paraphrases / paraphrased / paraphrasing

example_sentence_en: Please summarize the main points of the article.
example_sentence_cn: 请概括这篇文章的要点。
inflection: 动词变化: summarizes / summarized / summarizing

example_sentence_en: Critical thinking is essential in academic study.
example_sentence_cn: 批判性思维在学术研究中至关重要。

example_sentence_en: From the clues in the text, we can infer that he is guilty.
example_sentence_cn: 从文中的线索可以推断他是有罪的。
inflection: 动词变化: infers / inferred / inferring

example_sentence_en: The implications of this discovery are enormous.
example_sentence_cn: 这一发现的含义是巨大的。

example_sentence_en: A novelist can tell a story from different perspectives.
example_sentence_cn: 小说家可以从不同视角讲述故事。

example_sentence_en: The essay needs to be more coherent and organized.
example_sentence_cn: 这篇文章需要更加连贯有条理。

example_sentence_en: She is very articulate and expresses herself well.
example_sentence_cn: 她表达能力很强，能清晰地表达自己的想法。
inflection: 动词变化: articulates / articulated / articulating
